zh.lifeSummary: Joan Greystoke是John Greystoke和Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers的女兒，於1408年出生在英國波藍德格斯托可。她於1423年與John Darcy在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Greystoke was born in 1408, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England as the daughter of John Greystoke and Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. She married John Darcy in 1423, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1472, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Greystoke est née en 1408, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, fille de John Greystoke et Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Elle a épousé John Darcy en 1423, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1472, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Greystoke wurde 1408 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, als Tochter von John Greystoke und Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers geboren. Sie hat 1423 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom John Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1472 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Greystoke è nata il nel 1408 nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England come figlia di John Greystoke e Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Lei sposato John Darcy nel 1423, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1472, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Greystokeは1408年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクでJohn GreystokeとLady Elizabeth de Ferrersの娘として生まれた。1423年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohn Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年に64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Greystoke(은)는 1408년 영국 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 John Greystoke(와)과 Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 John Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Greystoke nasceu em 1408, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra filha de John Greystoke e Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Ela casou-se com John Darcy em 1423, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1472, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Greystoke родилась в 1408 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия. Её родителей звали John Greystoke и Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Darcy в 1423 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1472 г. в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Greystoke nació en 1408, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra como hija de John Greystoke y Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Se casó con John Darcy en 1423, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1472, a la edad de 64 años.
